zh.Freusburg: 德國海藍-普法爾茲阿爾騰吉陳福斯包格

zh.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autun是Adelbert von Freusberg und Autun和NN Von Freusburg  von Autun的兒子，於1100年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲阿爾騰吉陳福斯包格。他於1125年與Adelheid Von Auxerre在海因里希_海普洛文次阿爾騰吉陳基爾興 (希)福斯包格結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autun是Adelbert von Freusberg und Autun和NN Von Freusburg  von Autun的儿子，于1100年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲阿爾騰吉陳福斯包格。他于1125年与Adelheid Von Auxerre在海因里希_海普洛文次阿爾騰吉陳基爾興 (希)福斯包格结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Autun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Aveton Giffard in Devon, meaning ‘farm by the River Avon’, from the river name Avon + Old English tūn ‘settlement’. The later manorial suffix Giffard is derived from Walter Giffard, who held the manor in 1242.
English: variant of Alton and Oldton (for which see Alton 2).
Altered form of   Auten  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Alton
meanings: habitational name from any of the many places called Alton, in Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Leicestershire, Staffordshire, Wiltshire, Worcestershire, and elsewhere. The origin of the placename is various: Alton in Derbyshire and Alton Grange in Leicestershire probably have as their first element Old English (e)ald ‘old’. Those in Hampshire, Dorset, and Wiltshire are at the sources of rivers, and are named in Old English as ‘settlement (tūn) at the river source (ǣwiell)’. Others derive from various Old English personal names; for example, the one in Staffordshire is formed with an unattested personal name, Ælfa, and one in Worcestershire, Eanulfintun in 1023, is ‘settlement associated with (-ing) Ēanwulf’. The surname may also be from Auton Stile in Durham Saint Oswalds (Durham), which is recorded as Altonec. 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. en.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autun was born in 1100, in Freusburg, Altenkirchen, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany as the son of Adelbert von Freusberg und Autun and NN Von Freusburg  von Autun. He married Adelheid Von Auxerre in 1125, in Freusburg, Kirchen (Sieg), Altenkirchen, Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autun est né en 1100, à Freusburg, Altenkirchen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, fils de Adelbert von Freusberg und Autun et NN Von Freusburg  von Autun. Il a épousé Adelheid Von Auxerre en 1125, à Freusburg, Kirchen (Sieg), Altenkirchen, Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autun wurde 1100 in Freusburg, Altenkirchen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland, als Sohn von Adelbert von Freusberg und Autun und NN Von Freusburg  von Autun geboren. Er hat 1125 in Freusburg, Kirchen (Sieg), Altenkirchen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen Adelheid Von Auxerre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autun è nato il nel 1100 nel Freusburg, Altenkirchen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania come figlio di Adelbert von Freusberg und Autun e NN Von Freusburg  von Autun. Lui sposato Adelheid Von Auxerre nel 1125, nel Freusburg, Kirchen (Sieg), Altenkirchen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autunは1100年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズアルテンキルチェンフレウスブルグでAdelbert von Freusberg und AutunとNN Von Freusburg  von Autunの息子として生まれた。1125年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズアルテンキルチェンキルチェン (シエグ)フレウスブルグでAdelheid Von Auxerreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autun(은)는 1100년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 알텐커천 프레우스버그에서 Adelbert von Freusberg und Autun(와)과 NN Von Freusburg  von Autun의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1125년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 알텐커천 커천 (시그) 프레우스버그에서 Adelheid Von Auxerre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autun nasceu em 1100, em Freusburg, Altenkirchen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha filho de Adelbert von Freusberg und Autun e NN Von Freusburg  von Autun. Ele casou-se com Adelheid Von Auxerre em 1125, em Freusburg, Kirchen (Sieg), Altenkirchen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autun родился в 1100 г. в местности фреусбург, алтенкирчэн, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Его родителей звали Adelbert von Freusberg und Autun и NN Von Freusburg  von Autun. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid Von Auxerre в 1125 г. в местности фреусбург, кирчэн (сиег), алтенкирчэн, раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Von Freusburg Autun nació en 1100, en Freusburg, Altenkirchen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania como hijo de Adelbert von Freusberg und Autun y NN Von Freusburg  von Autun. Se casó con Adelheid Von Auxerre en 1125, en Freusburg, Kirchen (Sieg), Altenkirchen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
